# Vendored frontend libraries

| File | Package | Version | Source |
|------|---------|---------|--------|
| `mermaid.min.js` | mermaid | 10.9.3 | https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/mermaid@10.9.3/dist/mermaid.min.js |
| `svg-pan-zoom.min.js` | svg-pan-zoom | 3.6.1 | https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/svg-pan-zoom@3.6.1/dist/svg-pan-zoom.min.js |

Served via FastAPI `/static/vendor/*`. No build step — update by re-downloading pinned URLs.
